_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 53: Obligations for Providers of GPAI Models
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: EU AI Act Annex XI (Technical Documentation for GPAI models)
EU AI Act Annex XII (Information for downstream providers)
EU AI Office Code of Practice for GPAI providers
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 53 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Technical Documentation (Annex XI)
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST draw up and keep up-to-date technical documentation of the GPAI model in accordance with Annex XI.
requirements.rationale: Art. 53(1)(a) mandates Annex XI technical documentation for all GPAI providers.
acceptable_implementations: Comprehensive model card covering all Annex XI elements
Technical documentation repository with version control
Structured documentation system aligned with Annex XI checklist

requirements.title: Downstream Provider Documentation (Annex XII)
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST draw up and keep up-to-date information and documentation for downstream providers integrating the GPAI model, in accordance with Annex XII.
requirements.rationale: Art. 53(1)(b) requires sufficient documentation for downstream providers to comply with their own obligations.
acceptable_implementations: Downstream integration guide covering all Annex XII elements
API documentation with capability descriptions and limitations
Structured information package for downstream compliance

requirements.title: Copyright Policy and Compliance
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST put in place a policy to comply with Union copyright law, including identification and compliance with text and data mining opt-out reservations.
requirements.rationale: Art. 53(1)(c) mandates a copyright compliance policy, particularly regarding TDM opt-outs under the DSM Directive.
acceptable_implementations: Published copyright policy with TDM opt-out compliance process
Automated robots.txt and opt-out reservation crawler
Copyright compliance framework with training data provenance tracking

requirements.title: Training Data Summary
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST draw up and make publicly available a sufficiently detailed summary of the content used for training the GPAI model.
requirements.rationale: Art. 53(1)(d) requires a public training data summary to enable copyright holders to exercise their rights.
acceptable_implementations: Published training data summary following the EU AI Office template
Public data card with dataset descriptions and sources
Transparency report covering training data composition and provenance

scoring.partial: R01 + R02 met, R03 or R04 incomplete
